plan_adjustments.message: Replaced prior plan (incorrect scope: CodeChunk optionality + --slim flags) with correct scope per DISPATCH-2026-05-08-005: IndexingResult schema audit only.

communication_log.message: Workorder WO-RAG-INDEX-SCHEMA-REDUCTION-001 created. Plan type: phased, 2 phases. Phase 2 is a hard stop gated on Phase 1 audit-matrix.md. Scope: IndexingResult + IndexingStatistics + IndexingError field audit only.

Phase 1 audit complete. audit-matrix.md written. Findings: IndexingResult — REMOVE: filesProcessed, processingTimeMs (2 fields); FREEZE: chunksSkipped, chunksFailed, stats, errors, chunksFailedDetails (5 fields); KEEP: chunksIndexed, status, chunksSkippedDetails, validationGateRefused, validationReportPath (5 fields). IndexingStatistics — FREEZE all 5 fields. IndexingError — FREEZE all 4 fields. AC-05a and AC-05b PASS at baseline (indexing-gate-invariant.test.ts 12/12). Pre-existing 67 failures are unrelated to this WO scope. HARD STOP: Phase 2 requires USER/ORCHESTRATOR approval before field removal begins.
